topic: World Cup 2026 Golden Boot race — top scorers
key: World Cup 2026 Golden Boot race — top scorers

data.cta_english: Who will win the Golden Boot? Comment below!

segments.voice_english: The 2026 Golden Boot race is exploding because England's Harry Kane has already fired in six incredible goals.
segments.subtitle_english: The 2026 Golden Boot race is exploding because England's Harry Kane has already fired in 6 incredible goals.
segments.voice_hindi: 2026 गोल्डन बूट की दौड़ विस्फोटक हो रही है क्योंकि इंग्लैंड के हैरी केन पहले ही छह अविश्वसनीय गोल कर चुके हैं।

segments.voice_english: Norway's giant striker Erling Haaland is right ahead because he has smashed seven goals to keep his team fighting.
segments.subtitle_english: Norway's giant striker Erling Haaland is right ahead because he has smashed 7 goals to keep his team fighting.
segments.voice_hindi: नॉर्वे के विशाल स्ट्राइकर एर्लिंग हालैंड ठीक आगे हैं क्योंकि उन्होंने अपनी टीम को लड़ने के लिए सात गोल किए हैं।

segments.voice_english: England's young midfielder Jude Bellingham is tied with him after he also scored seven goals in this tournament.
segments.subtitle_english: England's young midfielder Jude Bellingham is tied with him after he also scored 7 goals in this tournament.
segments.voice_hindi: इंग्लैंड के युवा मिडफील्डर जूड बेलिंगहैम भी इस टूर्नामेंट में सात गोल करके उनके बराबर हैं।

segments.voice_english: Lionel Messi stays ahead of everyone because the legendary Argentine captain has scored eight goals in this race.
segments.subtitle_english: Lionel Messi stays ahead of everyone because the legendary Argentine captain has scored 8 goals in this race.
segments.voice_hindi: लियोनेल मेस्सी सभी से आगे रहते हैं क्योंकि अर्जेंटीना के महान कप्तान ने इस रेस में आठ गोल किए हैं।

segments.voice_english: Kylian Mbappe leads the entire world with ten goals so the French star is currently ruling the race.
segments.subtitle_english: Kylian Mbappe leads the entire world with 10 goals so the French star is currently ruling the race.
segments.voice_hindi: किलियन एम्बाप्पे दस गोल के साथ पूरी दुनिया में सबसे आगे हैं इसलिए फ्रांसीसी स्टार वर्तमान में दौड़ में सबसे आगे हैं।

data.youtube_title: Mbappe Ne Messi Ko Diya Shock! World Cup 2026 Race 🤯
title_options: Mbappe Ne Messi Ko Diya Shock! World Cup 2026 Race 🤯
Messi vs Mbappe: World Cup 2026 Ka Shocking Topper 🏆
Haaland Aur Bellingham Ka Toofan! WC 2026 Race ⚡
data.description: FIFA World Cup 2026 ki Golden Boot race bilkul crazy ho chuki hai! Kylian Mbappe 10 goals ke sath sabse aage hain, lekin Messi bhi 8 goals ke sath piche hi hain. Haaland aur Bellingham 7 goals par tike hain, aur Harry Kane ke 6 goals ne is race ko aur exciting bana diya hai! Aapko kya lagta hai, ye trophy kaun ghar le jayega? Comment me batao! 👇⚽

topic: Top 5 greatest underdog stories in football

data.hook_english: This 5000-to-1 shock will freeze your brain!
data.cta_english: Can any club repeat Leicester's 5000-to-1 miracle?

segments.voice_english: Leicester City was bottom of the league in April 2015, so they had to win seven of their last nine matches.
segments.subtitle_english: Leicester City was bottom of the league in April 2015, so they had to win seven of their last 9 matches.
segments.voice_hindi: अप्रैल 2015 में लीसेस्टर सिटी लीग में सबसे नीचे थी, इसलिए उन्हें अपने पिछले नौ मैचों में से सात में जीत हासिल करनी पड़ी।

segments.voice_english: Jamie Vardy was playing non-league football recently, when he suddenly scored in eleven consecutive games to break the Premier League record.
segments.subtitle_english: Jamie Vardy was playing non-league football recently, when he suddenly scored in eleven consecutive games to break the Premier League record.
segments.voice_hindi: जेमी वर्डी हाल ही में गैर-लीग फुटबॉल खेल रहे थे, जब उन्होंने अचानक लगातार ग्यारह मैचों में स्कोर बनाकर प्रीमियर लीग रिकॉर्ड तोड़ दिया।

segments.voice_english: Leicester shocked wealthy Manchester City in February, after Riyad Mahrez scored a great solo goal to secure a three one away win.
segments.subtitle_english: Leicester shocked wealthy Manchester City in February, after Riyad Mahrez scored a great solo goal to secure a 4 away win.
segments.voice_hindi: लीसेस्टर ने फरवरी में अमीर मैनचेस्टर सिटी को चौंका दिया, जब रियाद महरेज़ ने शानदार एकल गोल करके तीन एक से जीत हासिल की।

segments.voice_english: Tottenham lost their title hopes in May, because Eden Hazard scored in the 83rd minute to seal Leicester's league trophy.
segments.subtitle_english: Tottenham lost their title hopes in May, because Eden Hazard scored in the 83rd minute to seal Leicester's league trophy.
segments.voice_hindi: टोटेनहैम ने मई में अपनी खिताब की उम्मीदें खो दीं, क्योंकि ईडन हैज़र्ड ने 83वें मिनट में गोल करके लीसेस्टर की लीग ट्रॉफी पक्की कर दी।

segments.voice_english: Bookies gave Leicester five thousand to one odds, but Claudio Ranieri proudly lifted the Premier League trophy to finish it.
segments.subtitle_english: Bookies gave Leicester 5000 to one odds, but Claudio Ranieri proudly lifted the Premier League trophy to finish it.
segments.voice_hindi: सट्टेबाजों ने लीसेस्टर को एक के मुकाबले पांच हजार का भाव दिया, लेकिन क्लाउडियो रानिएरी ने इसे खत्म करने के लिए गर्व से प्रीमियर लीग ट्रॉफी उठाई।

data.youtube_title: Leicester City ka Insane Miracle! 🤯 Top 5 Underdog Stories
title_options: Leicester City ka Insane Miracle! 🤯 Top 5 Underdog Stories

data.description: Leicester City ka wo 2015 season yaad hai? Jo bilkul impossible tha! 🤯 Jamie Vardy ki non-league se Premier League champion banne ki kahani sach me goosebumps de deti hai. Aapke hisab se football history ka sabse bada underdog moment kaunsa hai? Comment me batao! 👇⚽
